reference: I'M BETTER IN NOT BEING TORN TO PIECES BY COUGHING O'NIGHTS BUT I'M WEARY AND TIRED O MILTON AND LONGING TO GET AWAY TO THE LAND O BEULAH AND WHEN I THINK I'M FARTHER AND FARTHER OFF MY HEART SINKS AND I'M NO BETTER I'M WORSE
text: i'm better o not being torn to pieces by coughing o nights but i'm weary and tired o milton and longing to get away to the land of bula and when i think i'm farther and farther off my heart sinks and i'm no better i'm worse
